//: The ttsc/Go lowering config read by @ttsc/unplugin/bun during the Bun.build emit (build.ts): src/main.ts needs BOTH registration and addOptions<T>() lowering. Stage selection is declare-by-depending, resolved HOST-SIDE (§100): there is no `plugins` array, so ttsc auto-discovery spawns the one owner host (transforms/cmd/ttsc-std) from this app's direct *.extras devDeps (di.extras + di.extras.options), and the host runs its WHOLE always-on stage table on every file (there are no bespoke di / di_options / config stages any more — W6p3 deleted them; ALL domain forms now lower through the generic inline stage plus the primitive stages inline/nameof/signatureof/keyof/valueof/mergesynth, reached through di.extras's honest primitives.extras dep). The tokenless forms — `add<T>(ctor)` / `addFactory<T>(fn)` / `addValue<I>(value)`, `resolve`/`resolveAsync`/`tryResolve`/`isService`, the trailing `.as<"scope">()`, and `addOptions<T>()` — are substituted from di.extras's / di.extras.options's rhombus.inline bodies (the same host scan collects them) into their explicit-token forms (`this.add(tokenfor<T>(), ctor, signatureof(ctor))`, `this.addValue(tokenof<I>(), value)`, `this.resolve(tokenfor<T>(), keyof<T>())`, etc.), then the fixed-point loop lets the primitive stages peel each token + dependency-signature array + scope-value one layer per pass until nothing is left to lower; mergesynth is inert here (this app installs no augmentation). Extends the base tsconfig. The `types` augmentations are RETAINED: declaration-site matching anchors each authored form on its `declare module '@rhombus-std/di.core'` sugar overload, so the augment must be in the Go program too — the inline matcher discriminates the `add`/`addFactory`/`addValue` overloads by type-param count + value-param NAMES `ctor`/`factory`/`value`; the tokenless `add`/`as`/`resolve` sugar declarations live ONLY in di.extras's augment. @types/bun keeps the Generic Host's process/node:* surface resolved. Lint stays on plain tsc via the base tsconfig.json.
